title: Bluebird Lib
description: Powerful library for mods by Bluebird Studios.
body:
# Bluebird Library
This mod allows you to run mods created by Bluebird Studios.

![line](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b54da892dc9ee761d5cdab0b32d883a65ccb5edf.png)
